MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Linda Martin.
Attorney Ryan Patrick appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Eddie Graham is present.
Attorney Teresa Friend representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of June 3, 2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
